description: Style NoteThis mid-rise fusion brief from facit is crafted using pure cotton in a 1x1 rib knit that lets the fabric contour your hips and allows you to stretch with ease. The brief comes in collegiate-inspired colour combinations that never go out of style, while the printed label on the inside provides abrasion-free comfort.Product DetailsRed brief made of 100% premium cotton in a 1x1 rib knit, has a durable signature logo waistband, black panels on either side of the front pouch, flat seam details and printed label on the innerMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash warm at 40 degrees with like coloursDo not bleachTumble dry lowFitMid rise
